# Attribution

This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 or later.

It incorporates ideas and algorithms from the following projects:

- **Riichi-Trainer** by Euophrys (https://github.com/Euophrys/Riichi-Trainer), licensed under GPL-3.0.
  The efficiency/ukeire trainer mode is adapted from this project.

- **riichi-mahjong-trainer** by Dušan Juretić (https://github.com/djuretic/riichi-mahjong-trainer), licensed under MIT.
  The chinitsu waits trainer mode is adapted from this project.

The source code in this repository has been rewritten and combined for use as a single offline-first Progressive Web App.
